data.name: Showering With My Yandere Goth Soulmates
data.detailed_description:
This game is a continuation from the story in "Dominated by: Yandere Goth Gangster."

After Kurokara knocked you out by drowning you in her pussy juice, Kurorigi arrives back home from her run. A few minutes later, you wake up in the shower with both of your giant, goth, sadistic, yandere soulmates who love you very, very, very much. Throughout the night, your two soulmates use you as their own personal fuck toy, mercilessly passing you around, taking turns abusing you for their own sexual desires.

  • ~3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 24 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
